query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS psb_state_directories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uf VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  state_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  president_name VARCHAR(200),
  president_sequencial VARCHAR(20),
  address VARCHAR(500),
  city VARCHAR(100),
  cep VARCHAR(10),
  phone1 VARCHAR(30),
  phone2 VARCHAR(30),
  email VARCHAR(200),
  website VARCHAR(300),
  facebook VARCHAR(300),
  instagram VARCHAR(300),
  twitter VARCHAR(300),
  youtube VARCHAR(300),
  notes TEXT,
  last_updated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS psb_municipal_directories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uf VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL,
  city_code VARCHAR(10),
  city_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  president_name VARCHAR(200),
  president_sequencial VARCHAR(20),
  address VARCHAR(500),
  phone VARCHAR(30),
  email VARCHAR(200),
  notes TEXT,
  last_updated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_uf (uf),
  INDEX idx_city_code (city_code)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS politician_affiliation_overrides (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  candidato_sequencial VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  candidate_name VARCHAR(300),
  uf VARCHAR(2),
  original_party VARCHAR(10),
  current_party VARCHAR(10),
  current_party_name VARCHAR(200),
  change_date DATE,
  notes TEXT,
  verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_sequencial (candidato_sequencial)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS data_sync_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  source VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  sync_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  records_updated INT DEFAULT 0,
  message TEXT,
  synced_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  change_date DATE,
